# SYNAPSE

> SYNAPSE is a free, AI-powered dopamine recovery and habit tracker that helps people quit compulsive digital habits — short-form video (reels), social media, pornography, gaming, junk food, and gambling — through personalized, adaptive guidance and real-time urge support. Reset. Rewire. Rise.

SYNAPSE is a privacy-first Progressive Web App (PWA). It is a self-help behavior-change tool, not medical or clinical treatment. The method has three stages: Understand (learn your triggers and patterns), Guide (personalized interventions when you need them), and Grow (adapt as your habits change).

## Core
- [Home](https://www.synapserewire.site/): Product overview, how it works, recovery levels, and the SYNAPSE method.
- [About SYNAPSE](https://www.synapserewire.site/): Mission, vision, founders (Parth Goyal, Sandali Tiwari), and values.

## Guides
- [Quit Addictive Habits — All Guides](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/): Index of science-based recovery guides for every addiction SYNAPSE covers.
- [How to Stop Watching Reels](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/reels): A practical, research-informed guide to quitting short-form video addiction — why it's addictive and a step-by-step plan to break the loop.
- [How to Stop Watching Porn](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/porn): A judgment-free, research-informed guide to quitting pornography — the Coolidge effect, escalation, the shame loop, and a step-by-step plan.
- [How to Quit Social Media](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/social-media): Why social media is compulsive — validation, comparison, FOMO — and a step-by-step plan to take back your attention.
- [How to Stop Compulsive Gaming](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/gaming): Progression loops, loot boxes, and social obligation explained, plus a step-by-step plan to quit or cut back.
- [How to Stop Gambling](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/gambling): Near-misses, loss chasing, and the illusion of control — with a step-by-step recovery plan and crisis and debt resources.
- [How to Stop Eating Junk Food](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/junk-food): How ultra-processed food is engineered to override fullness, and a plan to rebuild your appetite.
- [How to Stop Doomscrolling](https://www.synapserewire.site/quit/doomscrolling): Negativity bias and threat-monitoring explained, and a plan to break the anxious bad-news loop.

## Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.synapserewire.site/privacy): How data is collected, used, retained, and protected.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.synapserewire.site/terms): Terms of use, including medical, crisis, and AI disclosures.
